CustomField.formula:
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.Id , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.Id, IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.Id , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.Id , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.Id ,
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Temp To Perm")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Temp To Perm")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.Id ,
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.Id , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Contract Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.Id , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Full Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.Id ,
IF ( AND (ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Permanent Part Time")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Temp To Perm")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Administrative'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Per Diem / PRN")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.Id , IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Nursing'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Per Diem / PRN")),Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.Id , IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,'Allied'), ISPICKVAL(Job_Type__c,"Per Diem / PRN")), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.Id,
IF (ISPICKVAL(Job_Category__c,"Physician/Advanced Practice"), Client__r.Biz_Dev_Perm_Physician__r.Id , "") ) ) ) ))))) )))) ))))))
CustomField.label: Biz Dev Rep ID
